archetype.label: Pre-1980 Urban Multifamily
archetype.description: High-priority retrofit target. Typical issues: poor facade insulation, single-glazed windows, inefficient gas boiler.

preliminary_package.ite_iee_warning: Required for maximum subsidy access. Typical cost €800–1,500. Takes 4–6 weeks.

flags.message: ITE/IEE report missing — needed for NextGen subsidy applications
EPC rating estimated from building age. Confirm with energy certificate for accurate subsidy calculation.

agent_summary: 1978 Barcelona multifamily block matched to Pre-1980 archetype. Strong financial position with €35,000 reserves and no debt. Building qualifies as priority subsidy target. ITE/IEE report missing — flag for follow-up. Preliminary package ready.
